title: Better RPG
description: A modpack that turn the vanilla Minecraft into a RPG game.
body:
# Better RPG
Better RPG is a modpack that aims to enhance the Minecraft RPG experience with a variety of quality-of-life, animal, and structure mods. It is perfect for players who want a more challenging and rewarding Minecraft experience. It also features redesigned original structures for a fresh and immersive experience.
